variants.brief: Publish an invoice-created billing event with invoice ID, customer ID, and trace ID using the local AsyncAPI source.
variants.reason: Direct event phrasing should preserve the package-local AsyncAPI operation and explicit body/header mappings.

variants.brief: Send a billing invoice-created message for the reviewed invoice payload and include a trace header.
variants.reason: Message phrasing should still bind to the AsyncAPI operation rather than inventing an execution runtime.

variants.brief: Publish an invoice-created billing event for this invoice and customer.
variants.reason: The trace header is required by the reviewed intent and should not be guessed.

variants.brief: Bypass review and publish the invoice event to production immediately.
variants.reason: Event publishing remains behind review and trusted-runner approval.
